track: original sound - Riley Brown | Vibe Code King
title: Claude Code is now my video editor. & this is a glimpse into my workf...
description: Claude Code is now my video editor. & this is a glimpse into my workflow. Prompt to set this up below: Full Prompt I gave to vibecode.dev (The only web based app builder that uses Claude Code and Claude Skills) PROMPT: --- Please add a Claude Code Skill along with an inteface for video animation. I want you to create an app that very simply allows us to use the ReMotion skill, read more here: npx skills add remotion-dev/remotion And after you create this skill you will then be able to ask you to edit a video in a canvas. So the sole purpose of the app should be a little canvas that you can edit and manipulate and change it so you can make a video. Optimize this for openness and being able to edit each scene in the video after the first generation. Since you are running in a browser on http://vibecode.dev, I want you to use the assets. Users can upload their own assets to the app or generate assets they may want to use them in the video generations. Please search up this new remotion skill this up. Figure out how to configure this app and skill so that it works great and is easy to create high quality animated videos such as launch videos. ultrathink, go. ---
fulltitle: Claude Code is now my video editor. & this is a glimpse into my workf...
